This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.

  • Uses of Throws in recoder.kit

    Methods in recoder.kit with parameters of type Throws
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(Throws child, MethodDeclaration parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(Throws child, MethodDeclaration parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(TypeReference child, Throws parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getRedundantExceptions(SourceInfo si, Throws t)
    Query that returns all redundant exceptions of the specified throws clause.
